entries.title: What Comes After July
entries.summary: July 4 I fly back to Taiwan. July 5 I sit the JLPT N2 exam. After that? I honestly don't know yet. Here's what I'm thinking.

entries.title: Eating Through Singapore's Michelin Guide
entries.summary: The guide has 45 starred restaurants and over 100 Bib Gourmands. I'm going through all of them. Here's what I've learned.

entries.title: JLPT N2 in 90 Days: My Study Stack
entries.summary: I'm not a language natural. I failed Japanese once already. Here's the exact system I'm using to not fail again.

entries.title: How I Ship Fast: Habits from Silicon Valley
entries.summary: 2y10m in Silicon Valley rewired how I think about speed. These are the habits I kept when I left.

entries.title: Why Singapore Works (For Me)
entries.summary: SV gave me scale. Taiwan gave me roots. Singapore gave me perspective. This is what the city actually does to you.

entries.title: 找工作一個月Get me a job in Taiwan
Why I Left the Bay Area
entries.summary: I told people I chose to leave Silicon Valley. The truth is, I had 40 days to take apart a life I thought I was still building.

ja.title: なぜシリコンバレーを離れたのか
ja.summary: 自分で決めたつもりでいた。でも実際は、40日で一つの生活を手放すことになった話。

entries.title: The Softness of Silicon Valley
entries.summary: I thought getting in was the hard part. It wasn't. The hard part was learning how to exist in a world where no one tells you if you're enough.

entries.title: From Night Markets to a One-Way Flight
entries.summary: Before Silicon Valley, there was a kid shaped by night markets, failure, and a quiet decision to try one more time.
